title: Unique Party 11359 - 18" Foil Brilliant Birthday Balloon, Rainbow
features: 1 Foil Balloon from the Brilliant Birthday range
Foil Birthday Balloon measures 18" (46cm) when fully inflated with helium (ships uninflated)
Colourful choice for decorating any adult or kids birthday party
Combine with latex balloons in a balloon bouquet, tie to the guest of honour's chair or attach to the top of a large birthday gift
Search for other Brilliant Birthday party supplies and coordinating solid colour party decorations from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a lovely balloon centrepiece to your special occasion with this colourful Foil Brilliant Birthday Helium Balloon. Featuring images of colourful party balloons, streamers and "Happy Birthday" text, this delightful Brilliant Birthday Balloon is an ideal choice for any birthday party. Mix this foil balloon with other latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a stunning balloon bouquet. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1 x Foil Balloon See more
